calendar.matters:
Petition To Compel Trustee To Administer Trust In Accordance With Section 6.1(H) Regarding Payment Of Funeral Expenses
Off Calendar May-23-2024 Text Ruling

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Apr-03-2024 Off Calendar

Petition To Compel Trustee To Administer Trust In Accordance With Section 6.1(H) Regarding Payment Of Funeral Expenses
Off Calendar Apr-03-2024 Continued To May-17-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Wendy Kindred appeared in propria persona.
Dan Irish appeared by zoom in propria persona.

The court stated that it received a response to the order to show cause and that it will not impose sanctions. The order to show cause is off calendar. The parties presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to the amount paid for the funeral expenses. The Petition to Compel Trustee to Administer Trust, etc. is continued to Friday May 17, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for a further hearing on the issue of reasonableness of the funeral expenses. Personal appearances are required.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: D. Nguyen. Not reported.

Petition To Compel Trustee To Administer Trust In Accordance With Section 6.1(H) Regarding Payment Of Funeral Expenses
Off Calendar Mar-05-2024 Continued To Apr-03-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Wendy C. Kindred, in person, in propria persona Petitioner.

At the outset, the court acknowledges Daniel Irish's absence. An Order to Appear will be issued to in propria persona Objector Daniel Irish to appear on Apr-03-2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why he failed to appear. An Order to Show Cause as to why Objector Daniel Irish should not be sanctioned $250.00 for failure to appear pursuant to CCP sec. 128 is set for Apr-03-2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

Petition To Compel Trustee To Administer Trust In Accordance With Section 6.1(H) Regarding Payment Of Funeral Expenses
Off Calendar Jan-30-2024 Continued To Mar-05-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Wendy Cheung Kindred appeared in person (pro per petitioner).
Daniel Irish appeared via zoom (pro per respondent).

Ms. Kindred stated that she filed an estate matter in San Mateo County, and that trial is set for February 05, 2024. The Court is requesting a parties to file a statement and attach the decision to the statement when the trail finalizes in San Mateo County. The matter is continued to March 05, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 file the statement by February 27, 2024. Parties to file a status from the trial by February 27, 2024.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.

Petition To Compel Trustee To Administer Trust In Accordance With Section 6.1(H) Regarding Payment Of Funeral Expenses
Off Calendar Jan-09-2024 Continued To Jan-30-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Compel Trustee To Administer Trust In Accordance With Section 6.1(H) Regarding Payment Of Funeral Expenses
Off Calendar Sep-19-2023 Continued To Jan-09-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Dan Irish (pro per) appeared via zoom (respondent).
Wendy Kindred (pro per) appeared in person (petitioner).

Ms. Kindred stated that she filed her petition in San Mateo County Courts and has received a hearing date of November 21, 2023, that she requests not to have her petition dismissed in San Francisco, and that she is to serve all parties of the new hearing date in San Francisco Courts including the new address Mr. Irish provided in court. Petition to compel trustee to administer trust in accordance with section 6.1 (H) etc., is continued to January 09, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Cabrera. Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order To Dismiss; Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Daniel Irish And Pamela Anderberg
Off Calendar Sep-13-2023 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Mediation
Off Calendar Jul-18-2023 Off Calendar

Petition To Compel Trustee To Administer Trust In Accordance With Section 6.1(H) Regarding Payment Of Funeral Expenses
Off Calendar Jul-18-2023 Continued To Sep-19-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Wendy Cheung Kindred appearing in person pro per (petitioner).
Daniel Irish appearing via zoom in pro per (trustee).

Mr. Irish stated mediation was unsuccessful, and that he intends to file a motion to dismiss. Status of mediation is ordered off calendar. Petition to compel trustee to administer trust in accordance with section 6.1(h) regarding payment of funeral expenses is continued to September 19, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Jaime. Not reported.

Petition To Compel Trustee To Administer Trust In Accordance With Section 6.1(H) Regarding Payment Of Funeral Expenses
Off Calendar Jun-06-2023 Continued To Jul-18-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Dan Irish (pro per) appearing via zoom (respondent).
Wendy Cheung Kindred (pro per) appearing in person (petitioner)and Dorthy Wong (Certified Cantonese interpreter) appearing via zoom for Petitioner.

Discussion was held as to cost of the funeral and a possible reimbursement. The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than July 11, 2023. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by July 14, 2023. The matter is continued to July 18, 2023 and the Parties are to return on July 18, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Brown. Not reported.
